/** * Implements the Blake3 algorithm providing a {@linkplain #initHash() hash function} with extensible output (XOF), a * {@linkplain #initKeyedHash(byte[]) keyed hash function} (MAC, PRF), and a * {@linkplain #initKeyDerivationFunction(byte[]) key derivation function} (KDF). Blake3 has a 128-bit security level * and a default output length of 256 bits (32 bytes) which can extended up to 264 bytes. *

* Adapted from the ISC-licensed O(1) Cryptography library by Matt Sicker and ported from the reference public domain * implementation by Jack O'Connor. *

* * @see BLAKE3 hash function * @since 1.16 */
